_comment: Copy to config.json and edit. CLI flags override these. See GUIDE.md.

hosts._note: On the Pi5, point 'host' at the laptop's LM Studio over Tailscale (hostname or 100.x IP). Pi5 has too little VRAM to host the model itself.

academics_local.note: folder on the Pi's own NVMe

laptop_share.note: SMB/Tailscale share of a laptop folder; mount it before running

usb_drive.note: external drive plugged into the Pi
